payload.answer: There is a conflict: the existing memory says “Sara is my daughter,” while the new input says “Sara is my niece.” I can’t safely decide which is correct or whether these refer to two different people named Sara. Safe actions are: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit.

entity_resolution.reason: The existing memory and new input both refer to a person named Sara but give conflicting family relationships to the user. It is not safe to assume whether this is the same Sara with a corrected relationship, two different people named Sara, or an erroneous new input.

details: The conflict requires user resolution before committing the new relationship.
